title: An Extra Income Stream
scenario: A weekend freelance gig editing videos could bring in roughly ₹8,000 a month. It needs about six hours each weekend and a one-time ₹6,000 spend on software and a microphone. You are tempted, but worry about burning out or losing focus at your day job.

choices.label: Start the side hustle in a disciplined way and channel the extra income into investments
choices.lesson: A second income stream diversifies your earnings and, if invested rather than spent, can dramatically accelerate your goals.

choices.label: Skip it and pick up extra paid overtime spending instead on takeaways to cope
choices.lesson: Extra income only helps if you protect your energy and invest the proceeds; new earnings frittered away leave you no further ahead.
